text:
EXPLANATION: The cited paper is a real work by James J. Heckman and Richard Robb, published in the book "Drawing Inferences from Self-Selected Samples" in 1986. The minor difference in the author's name (Richard Robb Jr vs. Richard Robb) is a common naming variation and does not constitute a hallucination.

LINK: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-4612-4976-4_7
FOUND_TITLE: Alternative Methods for Solving the Problem of Selection Bias in Evaluating the Impact of Treatments on Outcomes
FOUND_AUTHORS: James J. Heckman, Richard Robb
FOUND_YEAR: 1986
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
